summary: Iteration 4 backend testing for Dosti Dil Se. Verified TOTP 2FA flow end-to-end (login step='setup'/'code', provisioning_uri secret matches DB, verify-totp invalid/valid codes, access-JWT rejected as pre_auth_token, protected endpoints via Bearer), reset-totp auth-gated + rotates secret + resets totp_verified + forces next login back to setup. Donations: gift_to/gift_occasion persist when amount>=500 and are nulled when <500 (verified via /admin/donations). Team endpoint returns 4 seeded members in order. _id never leaks. 32/35 tests pass. 3 FAILURES are all caused by one bug: WallDonor Pydantic model omits gift_to + gift_occasion so /api/donations/wall does not return those fields even though they are projected from Mongo.

critical.issue: Response omits gift_to and gift_occasion. WallDonor Pydantic model (server.py lines ~146-152) does not declare these fields, so Pydantic strips them from the response despite the find() projection including them. Spec for iter 4 explicitly requires these on the wall.

action_items: Add gift_to: Optional[str] = None and gift_occasion: Optional[str] = None to the WallDonor model in /app/backend/server.py (around line 146) so /api/donations/wall exposes them. After that fix, re-run pytest to see all 35/35 pass.
critical_code_review_comments: TOTP security: verify-totp uses valid_window=1 (accepts prev+current+next 30s code). Standard and fine for typical clock skew.
pre_auth vs access JWT: both are signed with JWT_SECRET but differentiated by the `type` claim; decode_pre_auth_token correctly rejects type='access'. Verified.
reset-totp: rotates secret via pyotp.random_base32() and sets totp_verified=False; subsequent login returns step='setup' with new provisioning_uri embedding the new secret. Verified.
Race/time-skew: test suite retries verify-totp once after sleep(1) to avoid 30-second boundary flake. Server-side could also widen valid_window but 1 is OK.

Latent bug (carry-over from iter 1/2): `logger` reference inside create_donation_order Razorpay exception branch is below logger init line order - will NameError only if razorpay_client is configured AND throws. Still unfixed but dormant in placeholder mode.
Deprecation (carry-over): @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated; migrate to lifespan context manager.
Unbounded base64: photo_base64/image_base64 still have no size cap server-side.
WallDonor model is missing the two new iter-4 fields - root cause of the 3 failing tests. One-line fix.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten for iter 4: 2FA TOTP flow, reset-totp stateful test, gift fields, team seed, retained coverage for donations/contact/projects/stats)
test_credentials: admin@dostidilse.org / Dosti@2026. TOTP secret read live from db.admins.totp_secret and current code computed via pyotp.TOTP(secret).now(). After reset-totp test runs, admin is re-set-up within that test so subsequent tests (and next testing agents) find totp_verified=True.
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed donations inserted (some marked paid) with gift_to='Ananya'/gift_occasion='Birthday' for amount>=500 and with gift fields submitted but nulled for amount<500. Test entries: db.donations.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}); db.contact_messages.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent adds gift_to + gift_occasion to the WallDonor model, re-run: `set -a && source /app/frontend/.env && source /app/backend/.env && set +a && python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Admin TOTP state will remain verified=True between runs. If admin TOTP gets reset externally, the login helper handles step='setup' the same way. Razorpay still in placeholder mode so signature check is skipped.
rca of the issue: Root cause: server.py defines `class WallDonor(BaseModel)` without gift_to / gift_occasion fields. In `get_donor_wall` the Mongo projection includes them but Pydantic discards unmodeled fields during `WallDonor(**d)` instantiation. Reproduction: POST /api/donations/create-order with amount=500, gift_to='Ananya', gift_occasion='Birthday' -> verify -> GET /api/donations/wall -> donor entry lacks gift_to/gift_occasion keys. Fix: add `gift_to: Optional[str] = None` and `gift_occasion: Optional[str] = None` to WallDonor. No DB or logic change needed.
